•
The yearly predictio n for India is a very important
area. Many successful predictions for many sectors can
be done very easily without much effort. Of course an
astrologer who has some knowledge on these subjects
can easily beat research analyst and economy
professors. There is a model, which is used by
previous generation of astrologer. I use a model,
which is comprehensive market oriented and making
reading interesting and useful. This model is tough to
follow, though possible for a person has who has some
basic knowledge of economics and commerce.
